g.text: SELECT LaunchUrl FROM ScormPackages WHERE TrainingId = @TrainingId
Open exam player with Countdown Timer
Ask chatbot "How do I complete my SCORM course?"
Send query to Gemini API (Query + system prompt)
Go to Support -> Fill Ticket form -> Click Submit
INSERT INTO SupportTickets (UserId, Subject, Message, Status='Open')
Show ticket in help list with status "Open"
